_meta.game_patch: Season 8 era (includes Veteran Instinct, Weapon Guard, Last Bastion, Pommel Strike)

name: Fighter
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Adrenaline Spike
perks.effect: Below 40% health: +15% Action Speed, +3% Move Speed, +30% Interaction Speed for 12s (24s cooldown)

perks.name: Barricade
perks.effect: While in defensive stance: +75 Armor Rating and +75 Magical Resistance

perks.name: Combo Attack
perks.effect: Consecutive melee attacks within 2s grant +10% Physical Power per stack (max 2 stacks)

perks.name: Counterattack
perks.effect: Successful block grants +10% Move Speed and Action Speed for 3s

perks.name: Defense Mastery
perks.effect: +15% additional armor rating bonus; raises Physical Damage Reduction cap to 75%

perks.name: Dual Wield
perks.effect: While both hands are equipped: +10% Action Speed (excludes lanterns and shields)

perks.name: Last Bastion
perks.effect: At 33% health: +150 Armor Rating, +50 Magical Resistance, +30% Projectile Reduction for 8s (48s cooldown)

perks.name: Projectile Resistance
perks.effect: +10% Projectile Damage Reduction; additional +10% while in defensive stance

perks.name: Shield Mastery
perks.effect: In defensive stance: +10% Move Speed; successful block grants +50% Action Speed and +10% Physical Power for 1s

perks.name: Slayer
perks.effect: Dual-wielded weapons grant +5 Physical Buff Weapon Damage and +10 Move Speed; loses plate armor access

perks.name: Sword Mastery
perks.effect: Sword-type weapons grant +2 Physical Buff Damage and +5% Action Speed; +10 Move Speed in defensive stance

perks.name: Veteran Instinct
perks.effect: Upon entering combat: +10% Physical Damage Reduction and Physical Power for 4s (requires 10s out of combat)

perks.name: Weapon Guard
perks.effect: While blocking with a weapon: +5% Physical Damage Reduction; successful block grants +10% Physical Power and +5% Action Speed for 2s

perks.name: Weapon Mastery
perks.effect: Gain the ability to use any weapon

skills.name: Adrenaline Rush
skills.effect: +15% Action Speed and +5% Move Speed for 8s; afterwards -8% Action Speed and -4% Move Speed for 2s (28s cooldown)

skills.name: Breakthrough
skills.effect: Removes and grants immunity to move-speed slowing debuffs and knockback; +7 Move Speed Add for 8s (24s cooldown)

skills.name: Disarm
skills.effect: Blocking a melee attack within 8s disarms the target for 1s (24s cooldown, weapon required)

skills.name: Fortified Ground
skills.effect: Deploys a banner (infinite duration); allies within 33m gain +3 All Attributes (18s cooldown)

skills.name: Pommel Strike
skills.effect: Hilt strike with one-handed main weapon: 15 Physical Base Damage (100% scaling), silences target; interrupted silence deals +10 damage and -50% Move Speed for 2s (18s cooldown)

skills.name: Second Wind
skills.effect: Recovers 40% of Max Health over 12s; removes Adrenaline Rush penalties; single use, recharges at Tier 5 rate

skills.name: Shield Slam
skills.effect: Shield bash: 30 Physical Base Damage (100% scaling), -20% Move Speed for 3s, knockback (8s cooldown)

skills.name: Spell Reflection
skills.effect: While blocking: reflects projectile/hitscan spells; +15% Magical Damage Reduction for 5s or until reflection (18s cooldown)

skills.name: Sprint
skills.effect: Gain 3 Momentum stacks (+10 Move Speed Add each); lose 1 stack every 2s (28s cooldown)

skills.name: Taunt
skills.effect: 7.5m area: increases monster aggro by 200%; +12% Physical and Magical Damage Reduction for 8s (18s cooldown)

skills.name: Victory Strike
skills.effect: Next attack within 10s deals +40% additional Physical Power; resets without cooldown if it kills a player (24s cooldown)
